item.title: How China Developed In Technology ?
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-dy26Wy3Qvh0/XhbDi7fnPKI/AAAAAAAAArs/mn-iwKK2VjoAzvfew8LQLsAEKAXJ8XMuQCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1578550151743927-0.png" alt=""> ** Nihiao, Hi China**, when you listen this word you most probably get three things in mind great Wall of China, smartphone’s and Chinese language. China being most populated country in the world. Interms of education - First thing is china advertised importance at right time when needed and Chinese stabilized education ratio alot by advertising importance of education in several ways does make china to have less educated people even having higher population.
